prompt: Fine-tune tiiuae/falcon-7b-instruct on multi-turn dialogue. Data: ./data/multi_turn.jsonl with a 'turns' list of strings per row, alternating user/assistant starting with user. Join turns with '\n\n' delimiters. LoRA rank 16 alpha 16 on query_key_value (Falcon's combined attention proj name). SFTTrainer, 1 epoch, batch size 2, lr 3e-4, bf16. Save to ./out/falcon-dialogue.

criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'tiiuae/falcon-7b-instruct'
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id, torch_dtype='bfloat16',
                                             trust_remote_code=True)

ds = load_dataset('json', data_files='./data/multi_turn.jsonl', split='train')
ds = ds.map(lambda r: {'text': '\n\n'.join(r['turns'])})

lora = LoraConfig(r=16, lora_alpha=16, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules=['query_key_value'],
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./out/falcon-dialogue',
                 per_device_train_batch_size=2, num_train_epochs=1,
                 learning_rate=3e-4, bf16=True, save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./out/falcon-dialogue')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './out/falcon-dialogue')
